items.title: Germany troop cuts send wrong signal to Russia, say two top US Republicans
items.dek: The chairs of the House and Senate armed services committees say withdrawing 5,000 service personnel risked undermining deterrence.
items.body: The chairs of the House and Senate armed services committees say withdrawing 5,000 service personnel risked undermining deterrence.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Huge crowd attends free Shakira Copacabana beach concert
items.dek: Shakira's appearance followed shows by Lady Gaga and Madonna, who have also performed on Copacabana beach in previous years.
items.body: Shakira's appearance followed shows by Lady Gaga and Madonna, who have also performed on Copacabana beach in previous years.

items.title: Kenya battles to stop the 'goons and guns' as fears of political violence grow
items.dek: More than 100 gangs are operating nationwide as the growing use of political thugs raises fears of election violence.
items.body: More than 100 gangs are operating nationwide as the growing use of political thugs raises fears of election violence.
